summary: A police vehicle passes by on the right side of the road while the ego-vehicle drives straight. Vehicles accumulate on the left side of the road, separated by a median barrier. A dump truck suddenly explodes violently, sending debris flying across the road.

events_timeline.event: Dump trucks explode violently, sending debris flying across the road.

uncertainties: Exact cause of explosion is unclear.
Extent of explosion impact on surrounding vehicles is unknown.

risk_assessment.why: Dump trucks exploding violently pose an immediate threat to nearby vehicles and pedestrians.
